name: Smartly.io Social Advertising Automation API
what_it_does: Social advertising automation platform with REST API — automating ad creation, testing, optimization, and scaling across Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, Snapchat, and TikTok, with dynamic creative optimization (DCO), automated budget management, AI-powered campaign optimization, and creative performance analytics for performance marketing teams.
use_cases: Automating ad creation and variation testing across social platforms via Smartly API
Pulling ad performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR) for marketing analytics dashboards
Managing dynamic creative optimization (DCO) rules and product feed integrations
Triggering budget optimization rules based on performance thresholds via webhook
Integrating Smartly campaign data with BI tools for cross-channel attribution reporting
not_for: Search advertising (Google/Bing Ads) — Smartly focuses on social channels
Small advertisers (<$10K/month spend) — Smartly is for high-volume performance marketers
Content marketing and organic social (use Sprout Social or Hootsuite for organic)
best_when: A performance marketing team or agency manages high-volume social advertising across Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok and needs creative automation, DCO, and budget optimization at scale that manual ad management cannot handle.
avoid_when: You're a small advertiser, primarily run search ads, don't have sufficient creative volume to benefit from automation, or your social ad spend is below $50K/month.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with advertiser-level access. Webhook for campaign events and budget alerts. Facebook Marketing API underlying meta-layer. TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat API access via Smartly abstraction. Role-based access for agency multi-client management. Scoped by resource type (campaigns, creatives, reporting).

pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of ad spend; contact sales; typically 2-5% of managed spend
pricing.notes: Finnish company (Helsinki). Founded 2013. Raised $140M+ Series B (2019). Backed by Eight Roads Ventures, Kreos Capital. 700+ employees. $4B+ ad spend managed annually. Customers include eBay, Spotify, Toyota, New Balance. Creative automation and DCO at scale is core differentiator. Dynamic Product Ads automation for e-commerce. Agency partner program for managing multiple clients. Gartner Cool Vendor in marketing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; aligned with underlying platform limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, ad sets, creatives, budgets, and reporting. OAuth2 auth. Good API documentation for enterprise users. Creative automation and DCO rules require Smartly platform knowledge. Underlying platform API limits (Meta, TikTok) propagate through Smartly. Webhook for budget and performance events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Reporting reads fully idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Ad creation not idempotent — check by name/ID before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Facebook/Meta API policy changes propagate to Smartly — monitor Meta changelog
Creative automation rules require Smartly-specific configuration syntax
DCO requires product feed integration — separate setup for each catalog
Agency multi-client access requires separate API credentials per advertiser account
High minimum ad spend requirement ($50K+/month) for Smartly ROI justification

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Ad performance data and audience targeting data may include user PII — GDPR data processing agreement required. Finnish company with GDPR-first design. Agency access model requires careful permission management for multi-client data isolation.
